findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem precomp \(|theorem precomp_homeomorph" code/TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/AmbientIsotopicNaturality.lean` shows line 46 proves `AmbientIsotopic (f.comp e) (g.comp e)` for `e : C(W, X)`, while line 72 proves the same with `e : W ≃ₜ X` by coercing to `C(W, X)`.
findings.fix: Remove this declaration or make it a local/private convenience; downstream users can call `hfg.precomp (e : C(W, X))`.
findings.issue: `AmbientIsotopic.precomp_homeomorph` is only the homeomorphism special case of the just-added `AmbientIsotopic.precomp`, creating parallel API for the same precomposition closure.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem postcomp_homeomorph_precomp|theorem homeomorph_precomp_postcomp" code/TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/AmbientIsotopicNaturality.lean` shows line 65 has the general `e : C(W, X)` theorem, and line 77 proves the same statement for `e : W ≃ₜ X` by coercion.
findings.fix: Remove this declaration or replace uses with `hfg.postcomp_homeomorph_precomp h (e : C(W, X))`.
findings.issue: `AmbientIsotopic.homeomorph_precomp_postcomp` is only the homeomorphism-source special case of `AmbientIsotopic.postcomp_homeomorph_precomp`, duplicating the two-sided coordinate-change API.

summary: The main relation-level naturality lemmas are not duplicated elsewhere, but the file adds two public homeomorphism-only special cases immediately after the general continuous-map versions.
